recentArticles.title: Are my Pokémon and K-pop cards worthless? A pro assessor told me the answer. - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: * I have a collection of around 500 Pokémon and K-pop photo cards. I took my cards to Johnathan Lim at Singapore's Oxley Grading, a business that helps collectors assess cards before they decide whether or not to send them in for grading at businesses like PSA and CGC. Lim likened collecting ~~of~~ valuable Pokémon cards to the stock market. "That's like buying a meme stock," Lim said,explainingI'd have to watch the market for anomalous surges and sell the cards at the right time. Of my close to 50 Pokémon cards,Lim said only one or two might get a PSA 9 or 10 when graded. One card of the "Final Fantasy" character Sephiroth — which I was gifted — is in great condition, Lim said, and I can consider grading it to lock in its value. As for the K-pop cards, Lim said I'd likely be at the mercy of market volatility. Based on Lim's pre-grading, it doesn't look likely that I'll secure a $100,000 valuation on my badly-cut Flareon Pokémon card.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於寶可夢和K-pop卡片的價值評估，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Max Eberl loves the spectacle of Bayern Munich vs. PSG - Yahoo Sports
recentArticles.snippet: # Max Eberl loves the spectacle of Bayern Munich vs. Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl is just another fan at this point — he is just as excited as the supporters from each club to watch the Bavarians face off with Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League. It’ll be incredibly exciting to see how this tie unfolds,” said Eberl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia). It will be incredibly exciting to see what happens, because two evenly matched teams, Paris and Bayern, are facing each other.”. Like many fans, Eberl is disappointed that Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany will not be leading the squad vs. “Vincent Kompany is our head coach, and we would have liked to have everyone available. That’s why I’m not worried,” Eberl said. *If you are looking for more Bayern Munich and German national team coverage, check out the latest episodes of Bavarian Podcast Works, which you can get on Acast, Spotify, Apple, or any leading podcast distributor…*.

recentArticles.title: A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later - The New York Times
recentArticles.snippet: # A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later - The New York Times. New York|A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later. # A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later. Jay Bryant’s admission of guilt on Monday was the first time anyone had publicly acknowledged orchestrating the 2002 killing of Jam Master Jay, the D.J. of Run-DMC. A man accused of conspiring to kill Jason Mizell, known as Jam Master Jay, the pioneering D.J. of the rap group Run-DMC, pleaded guilty on Monday to taking part in a murder plot that had baffled investigators for nearly two decades. The admission from Jay Bryant, 52, was the first time anyone had publicly acknowledged orchestrating the killing, which had shaken fans of Run-DMC, the hip-hop group known for its upbeat, sunny hip-hop in the late ’80s and early ’90s, distinct from the gangster rap taking over at the time.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於Run-DMC的DJ Jam Master Jay謀殺案的認罪進展，與華語歌手周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Man pleads guilty to murder 2 decades after death of Run DMC's Jam Master Jay - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Man pleads guilty to murder 2 decades after death of Run DMC's Jam Master Jay. A man has pleaded guilty to a charge of murder more than 20 years after the fatal ambush shooting of Run-DMC's Jam Master Jay. Jay Bryant, 52, changed his plea on Monday to guilty, telling a judge that he helped others get into a building to ambush and kill Jay Mizell, the pioneering rap star who was known as Jam Master Jay. Prosecutors said that Bryant's DNA was found on a hat inside the recording studio where Mizell was shot in the head in 2002. Prosecutors argued in court that Jordan and Washington planned the "execution" killing out of revenge after being cut out of a drug deal worth nearly $200,000. Prosecutors charged that he opened a back fire door to allow Jordan and Washington entry, and avoid buzzing into the studio so they could ambush Mizell.
recentArticles.summary: 一名男子在Run-DMC成員Jam Master Jay遇害二十年後，承認謀殺罪名，揭露了這起因毒品交易糾紛引發的槍擊案細節。

recentArticles.title: Third man charged in Jam Master Jay murder changes plea to guilty - CBS News
recentArticles.snippet: # Third man charged in Jam Master Jay murder changes plea to guilty. One of the three men charged in the killing of hip-hop icon Jam Master Jay changed his plea to guilty in court on Monday. Jam Master Jay, whose real name was Jason Mizell, was killed in 2002 inside a music studio in Hollis, Queens. Jay Bryant was charged in 2023, three years after Washington and Jordan. He changed his plea to guilty as an accomplice to Mizell's murder, after he originally pleaded not guilty to his earlier indictment. Prosecutors contended that Bryant slipped into the studio building and opened a back fire door so that Washington and Jordan could avoid buzzing up and could ambush the DJ. Prosecutors and trial witnesses said that Jordan shot the DJ while Washington blocked the door during the shooting and ordered one of Mizell's to get on the ground. #### Man charged with killing Run DMC member Jam Master Jay expected to plead guilty.
recentArticles.summary: 關於嘻哈偶像Jam Master Jay的謀殺案，第三名被告已認罪。

recentArticles.snippet: “I think you picked a really great song to showcase that,” she added, while Glaser said she got goosebumps throughout the entire performance. “I loved your character, the way you delivered the song, you had your own imagery and character that you created.” Finally, Richie said it was one of his favorite performances of Chris’ from the entire season and said the delivery was “spot on.”. You come out true to who you are,” and Underwood said she “loved everything about this performance,” from the look to the banjo and more. Brooks Rosser honored Swift’s *Fearless* era with a performance of “Love Story.” Considering he launched his own love story on the show just last week, this was the perfect song for the night! Underwood gushed over Brooks’ “magical voice” from the very first note and said it was a “very solid performance.”. Jordan’s second performance was of Bonnie Raitt‘s “I Can’t Make You Love Me,” and he said he was hoping to hit California energy on stage.

recentArticles.title: Chris Brown’s Disgusting Rant Sparks Massive Backlash Ahead of 2026 Tour - The Root
recentArticles.snippet: Some fans aren’t feeling Chris Brown, Usher’s upcoming tour and it’s prompting Breezy to respond. As some fans are gearing up in excitement over the upcoming “R&B” tour featuring Chris Brown and Usher this summer, others aren’t exactly feeling the vibe. He went on to say that while he understood the hate coming from men, on the account of them possibly feeling like their girlfriends and wives might be enamored with him and Usher on stage—he’s irritated at the “karens” and “self-hating hoes.” As such, he’s counting down the days until he can prove them wrong citing the presumptive success of the impending tour. But let’s not act like people don’t have a few good reasons as to why they’re not supporting this tour. When it comes to Usher, though he dominated tour stops not too long ago (cherries, anyone?): his recent comments on Sean “Diddy” Combs made a lot of people online severely side-eye him.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Reacts to Her Complex Pop-Up in New York for Self-Titled Album: 'I LOVE YOU' - Complex
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Reacts to Her Complex Pop-Up in New York for Self-Titled Album: 'I LOVE YOU'. ## Complex and Kehlani teamed up to give fans an exclusive way to shop her self-titled album and meet the singer herself. Rain or shine, the fans made sure to pop out for Kehlani’s Complex Pop-Up to support her self-titled album. On Saturday (April 25), fans lined the streets of New York in the freezing rain for a chance to purchase the singer’s latest album, released the day prior. Her self-titled is supported by the smash hit single “Folded,” which earned the singer her first Grammy Awards for Best R&B Performance and Best R&B Song. In a Complex interview with Jillian Superstar, Kehlani recalled the emotions she had to process when creating the album. musicKehlani Celebrates New Self-Titled Album With Complex NY Pop-Up. To coincide with the arrival of her new album, Kehlani is bringing a one-day pop-up to Complex NY.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞與周杰倫無關，主要報導歌手Kehlani為其新專輯在紐約舉辦快閃活動並與粉絲互動。

recentArticles.title: Siblings Detail Sexual Assault Lawsuit Against Michael Jackson Estate: “We Were Groomed” - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # Siblings Detail Sexual Assault Lawsuit Against Michael Jackson Estate: “We Were Groomed”. In a new interview with *The New York Times*, five siblings who grew up with close ties to Michael Jackson have discussed their decision to sue the late singer’s estate for sexual assault. Marie-Nicole said Jackson first assaulted her at age 12, while he was staying in her family home after the September 11 attacks; for Dominic, the abuse allegedly began at age 8, during a trip to Euro Disney. The Cascio siblings sued the Jackson estate in February, alleging that the late singer abused and sexually trafficked them for periods that, collectively, spanned more than a decade. Before filing that lawsuit, however, the Cascio siblings confronted Jackson’s estate about the alleged abuse. Jackson’s history of abuse allegations dates back to 1993, when Los Angeles police launched an investigation into the artist based on accusations that he had molested four children, including a 13-year-old boy.
recentArticles.summary: Siblings Detail Sexual Assault Lawsuit Against Michael Jackson Estate: “We Were Groomed” - Pitchfork

recentArticles.title: 'Michael' May Be 'Family-Friendly,' but It's a Movie That Taps Into Michael Jackson's Most Powerful Creative Fuel -- His Anger - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ May Be ‘Family-Friendly,’ but It’s a Movie That Taps Into Michael Jackson’s Most Powerful Creative Fuel — His Anger. You might think the reason it’s going to make a jillion dollars is that a lot of people are only too happy to revel in a Michael Jackson biopic that’s all greatest-hits cues and nostalgic high points: a two-hour hologram of Michael mania. The film tells a very particular story, and what that story is about is the very source of Michael Jackson’s creative power. But the underlying story that “Michael” tells, in tracing Michael’s war with his father, is the saga of Michael Jackson’s anger. We think of Michael Jackson as a “family-friendly” performer because that’s the image he crafted for himself, and he was indeed that thing, yet he also worked in the tradition of pop musicians who expressed a volcanic wrath that had no other outlet but song.

recentArticles.title: Michael Overtakes Oppenheimer With Biggest Box Office Debut Ever for a Biopic - IGN Nordic
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Overtakes Oppenheimer With Biggest Box Office Debut Ever for a Biopic. Michael made a huge $217 million at the global box office, enough to secure the record for the biggest opening weekend ever for a biopic. Michael is behind only The Super Mario Galaxy Movie in terms of global box office debuts this year. According to Variety, Michael cost nearly $200 million to produce (this includes reshoots for the third act totalling around $15 million). Michael’s box office success comes despite accusations of “whitewashing.” The movie ends in 1988 during the Bad tour, and does not feature Michael Jackson’s high-profile child abuse allegations. IGN’s Michael review returned a 3/10. Meanwhile, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie added another $36.7 million internationally this weekend after finally launching in Japan. The extended box office came after Amazon announced a return to Imax theaters for the Ryan Gosling sci-fi movie. Related reads:Debut Trailer for Upcoming Michael Jackson Biopic Gets Huge Views in First 6 Hours. ## Michael.

recentArticles.title: New Michael Jackson Movie’s Rave Audience Reception Slammed By Major Director: “People Just Want To Forget” - ScreenRant
recentArticles.snippet: # New Michael Jackson Movie’s Rave Audience Reception Slammed By Major Director: “People Just Want To Forget”. How can you tell an authentic story about Michael Jackson without ever mentioning the fact that he was seriously accused of being a child molester? If anyone’s making money, it’s Michael Jackson’s estate and the people who worked on this biographical picture. For Reed, this proves that most audiences *"don't care that [Michael Jackson] was a child molester"* and would rather enjoy his music without confronting the allegations. But there was enough noise online from those simplistic debunking [videos] that people found it easy to give themselves permission to like Michael Jackson’s music again, if they ever stopped liking it. And short of having actual video evidence of Michael Jackson engaged in sexual intercourse with a 7-year-old child, I don’t know what would be sufficient to change these people’s minds.

recentArticles.title: Badminton Senior Night Ends in Tenacious Defeat to Aragon - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: First seeded girls singles senior Viet-Tran Do, however, despite closely losing the first set, won the second and third set with pinpoint precision and accuracy, closing with a final score of 19-21, 21-15, and 21-15. Despite many early losses, second-seeded girls singles sophomore Stella Huang pulled off a quick and decisive win. Second-seeded girls doubles seniors Annika Furukawa and Jenna Lee\* had a close first set, conceding 21-18. Boys doubles couldn’t find the same success, with third-seeded juniors Caleb Swartzberg and Dylan Chou losing 21-11, 21-10 due to their opponents’ overpowering smashes. Third-seeded girls doubles freshman Alexandra Tong and sophomore Khanya Mtwa had a closer match, losing the first set 21-16, but coming back to win 21-15 and 21-14 in the second and third sets with dominant offensive rallies. However, second-seeded boys singles freshman Joshua Luo conceded 21-16, 21-16 due to nimble and accurate smashes by his opponent, despite consistent rallies.

recentArticles.snippet: BTS kicked off the North American leg of their “ARIRANG World Tour” with the first of three shows at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida, on Saturday night. The show’s second act boasted *ARIRANG* tracks “2.0.,” “NORMAL,” “FYA” and “Body to Body,” plus fan favorites “MIC DROP” and “IDOL.” For the encore, BTS ran through classics like “Butter,” “Dynamite,” the tour debut of “Permission to Dance,” and “Magic Shop.” Check out the band’s full setist below. BTS will play two more shows in Tampa before making their way to El Paso, Mexico City, Stanford, and Las Vegas as part of the first leg of their American tour. **BTS 2026 North American Tour Dates:**. 04/26 – Tampa, FL @ Raymond James Stadium. 04/28 – Tampa, FL @ Raymond James Stadium. 05/16 – Stanford, CA @ Stanford Stadium. 05/17 – Stanford, CA @ Stanford Stadium. 08/15 – Arlington, TX @ AT&T Stadium. 08/16 – Arlington, TX @ AT&T Stadium.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ moonwalks to $97 million opening, shattering record for music biopics - The Zimbabwe Mail
recentArticles.snippet: Home Entertainment Movies ‘Michael’ moonwalks to $97 million opening, shattering record for music biopics. NEW YORK — “Michael,” the big-budget Michael Jackson spectacle, shrugged off bad reviews and a troubled production to launch with $97 million in U.S. and Canada theaters, according to studio estimates Sunday, shattering a record debut for music biopics. “Michael” collected $120.4 million overseas, to give it a $217.4 million global opening — a new high for a music biopic. The opening for “Michael” added to a strong spring for Hollywood boosted by box-office hits like Amazon MGM’s “Project Hail Mary” and Universal’s “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.” After three weeks atop the box office, the “Mario” sequel slid to second place, with $21.2 million. 2. “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie,” $21.2 million. 3. “Project Hail Mary,” $13.2 million. 5. “The Drama,” $2.6 million. 6. “Hoppers,” $1.9 million. 9. “Mother Mary,” $1.2 million.

recentArticles.title: Michael moonwalks to $217m opening weekend, shattering box office records for a biopic - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael moonwalks to $217m opening weekend, shattering box office records for a biopic. Michael Jackson biopic has shrugged off controversy, bad reviews and a troubled production to take $217m worldwide, including $97m in North America. Michael, the big-budget Michael Jackson biopic, has shrugged off bad reviews and a troubled production to launch with a $97m opening in North American theaters, contributing to its enormous $217m (£160m, A$303m) worldwide box office and shattering the record for the biggest biopic opening of all time. The film, a highly authorised portrayal of the “king of pop” that was co-produced by the Jackson estate and stars Jackson’s nephew Jaafar Jackson, took $120.4m internationally and $97m domestic – combining to surpass Oppenheimer’s $180.4m worldwide opening weekend in 2023 and Bohemian Rhapsody’s $124m in 2018. Michael’s $97m domestic debut also surpassed records set by previous biopics in North America, including Oppenheimer ($82m in 2023), Straight Outta Compton ($60.2m in 2015) and Bohemian Rhapsody ($51m in 2018).

recentArticles.title: Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review - MELODIC Magazine
recentArticles.snippet: ### Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review. # Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review. It’s followed by her biggest track yet, “Folded” — the single earning Best R&B Song and Best R&B Performance at this years Grammys speaks for itself. “I Need You” featuring Brandy is arguably one of the top three on the album, and it’s because she manages to bring back the Princess of R&B and also blend in a modern sound and production that feels like a ode to the genre overall. Three more solo tracks, “You Got It,” “Call Me Back,” and “Still” are all heartfelt, vulnerable and reflective to the new, mature sound Kehlani carries throughout this album in comparison to her past projects. Kehlani and Cardi B together create some of the best hip-hop/R&B songs, just like on Cardi’s newest album with “Safe.” We’re hoping for more future collaborations between the two. Kehlani outdid herself with this album, showcasing her true love as a fan and artist of R&B.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Drops New Self-Titled Album – Listen Now! - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Drops New Self-Titled Album - Listen Now! **Kehlani** is back with new music! On Friday (April 24), the 31-year-old Grammy-winning singer debuted her brand new album, titled ***Kehlani***. “I am honored to present you with the album,” **Kehlani** wrote on Instagram after the album’s release. In a new interview with *Complex*, **Kehlani** opened up about the two-year process she went through while creating the album, which began with her working through some emotional baggage. “I went and locked myself in the room, and I started randomly processing a bunch of things from 2020,” **Kehlani** recalled. After getting out of her system, **Kehlani** resumed the process of making the album. If you didn’t see, **Kehlani** is nominated for three awards at the *2026 American Music Awards*, which are taking place on May 25 with **Queen Latifah** as host. recentArticles.title: 'We have no sleep': What it's like to run a round-the-clock celebrity fan page - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: "I feel like we have no sleep - we're at this 24 hours a day, seven days a week," says 25-year-old Canadian, Jay. He's a researcher for the social media account Buzzing Pop, which has 250,000 followers on X and posts round-the-clock news and gossip about the biggest celebrities in the world. "We're always keeping up - it's crazy but we love it," says Jay. Jay is part of a new generation of social media creators whose job it is to provide constant updates on fans' favourite film, TV and music stars. He says he started his fan account to "feel a bit closer" to the star, adding "I got likes from Taylor Swift, follows from her dancers and her team". And while Buzzing Pop is not dedicated to a single celebrity or music artist, Jay says his team works hard to keep their posts "neutral and informative".
recentArticles.summary: 這篇BBC報導描述了名為Jay的社群媒體研究員，如何為一個涵蓋多位名人的粉絲專頁Buzzing Pop提供24小時不間斷的資訊，但內容並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Beloved ABC host and rock musician dead at 64 after assisted suicide: ‘Did it his way’ - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Beloved ABC host and rock musician dead at 64 after assisted suicide: ‘Did it his way’. James Valentine, a popular ABC radio and television host for more than 30 years and a rock musician, has died. Valentine died by assisted suicide at home two years after he was diagnosed with cancer, **according to multiple reports.**. “Throughout his illness, James did it his way, which lasted all the way until the day when he made the choice to do voluntary assisted dying,” the statement continued. He was a saxophonist, and his music career took off in 1982 when he was a member of Jo Jo Zep. He also played with Model from 1984 to 1987 and Absent Friends from 1989 to 1990. Valentine hosted radio and television shows for ABC for nearly 40 years. He worked for 702 ABC Sydney for more than 25 years before retiring because of his illness. Add pennlive.com as a Preferred Source by clicking here.

recentArticles.title: Ex-Warriors star Klay Thompson accused of cheating off the court - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Ex-Warriors star Klay Thompson accused of cheating off the court. Klay Thompson has been accused of cheating … again, and this time there’s no defensive scheme a coach can draw up to help him. Thompson, now with the Mavericks and a former four-time NBA champion with the Warriors, found himself at the center of a storm Saturday after musician Megan Thee Stallion, whom he has been in a relationship with since last summer, publicly accused him of cheating on her. It wasn’t just the accusation — which is not the first time Thompson has been accused of infidelity — it was the tone. Megan famously spent holidays with Thompson and his family. Megan repeatedly showed up courtside to Thompson’s games. Thompson was most recently spotted with his mother, Julie, on April 14 at Megan’s Broadway performance of “Moulin Rouge.”. In a statement to our very own Page Six, Megan said it was her decision to end the relationship with Thompson. Thompson has yet to respond to Megan’s claims.

recentArticles.title: Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York - Fakta.co
recentArticles.snippet: # Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York. Actor Matt Dillon launched his debut solo art exhibition at The Journal Gallery in New York on Friday, April 24, 2026. "It’s not meant to be a literal description of the work or place, but rather the feeling behind the work," said Michael Nevin, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. Julia Dippelhofer, the gallery's other co-founder, described Dillon's approach to gathering inspiration during his journeys. He will pick up found textbooks or old newspapers to be repurposed as sketchbooks," said Julia Dippelhofer, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. "He is like a sponge and a great storyteller," said Julia Dippelhofer, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. ## Vancouver Whitecaps Face Relocation Risks Amid Record Winning Streak. ## Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York. ## Vancouver Whitecaps Face Relocation Risks Amid Record Winning Streak. ## Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York.
